ast.name: alert
ast.source: Simple TEX not working properly, see logs.
ast.target: Simple TEX 无法正常工作，请查看日志。

ast.name: alert
ast.source: No image found in clipboard, please copy an image then run command again.
ast.target: 剪贴板中未找到图片，请复制一张图片后重新运行命令。

ast.name: alert
ast.source: No markdown view found, please open a markdown file.
ast.target: 未找到 Markdown 视图，请打开一个 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: alert
ast.source: Error while fetching latex, please check the console for more information.
ast.target: 获取 LaTeX 时出错，请检查控制台获取更多信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The URL for the API endpoint, only active when self-hosted is enabled.
ast.target: API 端点的 URL，仅在启用自托管时生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your username for authentication. If you use self-hosted and a basic auth proxy before the container.
ast.target: 用于身份验证的用户名。如果您使用自托管，并在容器前设置了基本身份验证代理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your password for authentication. If you use self-hosted and a basic auth proxy before the container.
ast.target: 用于身份验证的密码。如果您使用自托管，并在容器前设置了基本身份验证代理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which provider to use for OCR and Latex conversion
ast.target: 选择用于 OCR 和 LaTeX 转换的提供商。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your SimpleTexToken, see README.md for more info.
ast.target: 您的 SimpleTexToken，更多信息请参阅 README.md。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Generate multiline LaTeX from last image to clipboard
ast.target: 从上一张图片生成多行 LaTeX 并复制到剪贴板

ast.name: name
ast.source: Generate inline LaTeX from last image to clipboard
ast.target: 从上一张图片生成行内 LaTeX 并复制到剪贴板

ast.name: name
ast.source: Generate markdown from last image to clipboard using Texify
ast.target: 使用 Texify 从上一张图片生成 Markdown 并复制到剪贴板

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please see the README.md for info on how to configure the extension
ast.target: 请参阅 README.md 了解如何配置此扩展。
